results.rendered_html:
tiro—√bhū -bhavati, to be set aside, disappear, vanish, hide one's self,  AV. viii, 1, 7 ;  ŚBr. ;  Ragh.  &c.:
Pass. -bhūyate id.,  KapS. i, 121 , Sch.:
Caus. -bhāvayati, to cause to disappear, dispel,  R. i, 44, 9  : Intens. (Subj. -bobhavat) to try to disappear with (instr.) or conceal anything (instr.),  ŚBr. ii, 2, 3, 16.
